untranslatable_reason: Pattern detection (Abandoned Baby candle pattern identification) and measure rule calculations (candle height × percentage multipliers) cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators and operators. The signal requires explicit candlestick pattern recognition logic and arithmetic calculations on candle dimensions (high - low) with dynamic percentage application, which are not available in the indicator set. Pivot-based approximation provided as fallback, but does not capture the intended measure rule logic.
translation_notes: The Abandoned Baby pattern and its measure rule require: (1) identification of a three-candle pattern with specific gap characteristics; (2) calculation of candle body/range height; (3) multiplication by success-rate percentages (50% bull, 55% bear). None of these can be expressed with the allowed indicators. Used pivot points (r1/s1) as a reasonable but incomplete substitute for target calculation. Entry conditions set to basic pivot crosses as proxy. The 50%/55% success rates and candle height calculations are not translatable.
